old_value: {"id":"otherworlds-rpg-5o1","title":"Rename Postgres container in Docker Compose config","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-01T15:39:31Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-01T15:55:36Z","closed_at":"2026-03-01T15:55:36Z","close_reason":"Closed"}

{"id":"otherworlds-rpg-ta6","title":"Replace Uuid::new_v4() with DeterministicRng for event IDs","description":"All 7 domain crates use Uuid::new_v4() for event_id in domain methods, breaking the replay determinism manifesto constraint. Fix requires: (1) Extend DeterministicRng trait with a next_uuid() method, (2) Thread \u0026mut dyn DeterministicRng through all domain methods alongside Clock, (3) Update all aggregate domain methods to use rng.next_uuid() instead of Uuid::new_v4(), (4) Update all command handler signatures to pass rng, (5) Update all tests to use SequenceRng or equivalent. Affects: narrative, character, rules, world-state, inventory, session, content aggregates.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T16:37:44Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-02T16:37:44Z"}

new_value: All 7 bounded contexts updated: Uuid::new_v4() replaced with rng.next_uuid() in domain methods, command handlers, and API routes. 352 tests pass, clippy clean.

old_value: {"id":"otherworlds-rpg-mqe","title":"Add PostgreSQL integration tests for domain crates","description":"All domain crate tests use RecordingEventRepository (mock). No crate tests the full round-trip through PgEventRepository with a real database. Add integration tests in otherworlds-api/tests/ that exercise each bounded context's command and query handlers against PostgreSQL, verifying event persistence, reconstitution, and optimistic concurrency. The existing 4 integration tests (character_test.rs) provide a pattern to follow.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T16:37:52Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-02T16:37:52Z"}

old_value: {"id":"otherworlds-rpg-dpo","title":"Implement content validation and compilation logic","description":"The content crate has two stub domain methods with TODOs: (1) validate_campaign() needs actual validation logic — schema checks, reference integrity, required-field verification, scene graph connectivity. (2) compile_campaign() needs actual compilation logic — transform validated campaign source into optimized runtime format (scene graph, lookup tables, etc.). Additionally, apply() for CampaignCompiled is a no-op and should set a compiled flag on the aggregate.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T16:37:47Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-02T16:37:47Z"}

{"id":"otherworlds-rpg-wdu","title":"Implement deep Markdown validation and compilation logic","description":"The validate_campaign() and compile_campaign() domain methods currently accept any ingested source. Implement deep logic: Markdown parsing, schema checks (required front-matter fields), reference integrity (scene/NPC cross-references), scene graph connectivity validation, and compilation transforms (scene graph generation, lookup tables, runtime optimization). The source field is now stored on the aggregate for access during these phases.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T20:56:21Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-02T20:56:21Z"}

Add pulldown-cmark and serde_yaml deps, new domain modules (campaign_model, parser, validator, compiler), wire into Campaign aggregate validate/compile methods.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T21:16:08Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-02T21:16:08Z"}

new_value: Implemented campaign Markdown validation and compilation pipeline with parser, validator, compiler, and full aggregate integration

old_value: {"id":"otherworlds-rpg-cm7","title":"Add #[instrument] tracing to domain command handlers","description":"Domain-level command handlers in all non-narrative crates lack #[instrument] tracing attributes. The API route handlers have tracing, but the domain command_handlers.rs files do not. Add #[instrument(skip(clock, repo), fields(aggregate_id, correlation_id))] to all command handler functions across character, rules, world-state, inventory, session, and content crates for consistent observability.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T16:37:49Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-02T16:37:49Z"}

old_value: {"id":"otherworlds-rpg-59k","title":"Install and configure Tailwind CSS v4 for SvelteKit","description":"Add Tailwind CSS v4 to the SvelteKit project. Install @tailwindcss/vite plugin, configure vite.config.ts, add base CSS import to app.html or +layout.svelte. Verify with a simple utility class on the index page. Follow Tailwind v4's new CSS-first configuration approach (no tailwind.config.js — use @theme in CSS).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T17:52:41Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-03T17:52:41Z"}

{"id":"otherworlds-rpg-1lu","title":"Add environment configuration with .env.example","description":"Create .env.example documenting all required/optional env vars. At minimum: API_BASE_URL (private, for server-side API calls), PUBLIC_APP_NAME (public). Configure  imports in SvelteKit. Add validation in hooks.server.ts to fail fast if required env vars are missing.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T17:52:54Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-03T17:52:54Z"}

{"id":"otherworlds-rpg-01w","title":"Set up Vitest and Playwright test infrastructure","description":"Install and configure: (1) Vitest — for unit tests and component tests. Add vitest.config.ts, configure svelte testing library (@testing-library/svelte), add test scripts to package.json. (2) Playwright — for E2E tests. Add playwright.config.ts, configure for SvelteKit dev server, add test:e2e script. (3) Create example tests to verify both work: a simple unit test and a smoke E2E test that loads the index page.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T17:53:01Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-03T17:53:01Z"}

{"id":"otherworlds-rpg-25t","title":"Define TypeScript API types matching backend contracts","description":"Create /types/ with TypeScript interfaces matching all backend request/response shapes across 7 bounded contexts: narrative, character, rules, world-state, inventory, session, content. Include shared types: CommandResponse, CommandResponseWithAggregate, ErrorResponse, UUID (string alias). Each context gets its own file. Types should match the Rust DTOs exactly.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T17:52:44Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-03T17:52:44Z"}

{"id":"otherworlds-rpg-44q","title":"Build shared layout shell with navigation","description":"Create the root +layout.svelte with: (1) Responsive app shell — sidebar or top nav, (2) Navigation links to major sections: Campaigns, Characters, Sessions, Play, (3) Tailwind-styled with consistent design tokens, (4) Proper HTML semantics (header, nav, main, footer), (5) SvelteKit preloading on hover (already configured). Keep it clean and minimal — this is a tabletop RPG tool, not a flashy game UI.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T17:52:52Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-03T17:52:52Z"}

{"id":"otherworlds-rpg-4uh","title":"Implement server-side API client in $lib/server/","description":"Create a typed API client that runs server-side only (in +page.server.ts and +server.ts). Responsibilities: (1) Base fetch wrapper with API_BASE_URL from env, (2) Typed methods for each backend endpoint grouped by context, (3) Consistent error handling — parse ErrorResponse from backend, throw typed errors, (4) Request/response logging in dev mode, (5) Correlation ID forwarding. Use $env/static/private for API_BASE_URL. Place in $lib/server/api/ so SvelteKit prevents client-side import.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T17:52:48Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-03T17:52:48Z"}

{"id":"otherworlds-rpg-fwh","title":"Set up error handling: +error.svelte pages and API error mapping","description":"Create: (1) src/routes/+error.svelte — user-friendly error page for 404, 500, etc., (2) /errors.ts — typed error classes (ApiError, NotFoundError, ValidationError, ConcurrencyConflictError) mapping to backend error codes, (3) Handle errors in +page.server.ts load functions with proper SvelteKit error() throws, (4) Consider a +layout.server.ts for global error boundary patterns.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T17:52:57Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-03T17:52:57Z"}

{"id":"otherworlds-rpg-ctg","title":"Build narrative scene display page","description":"Create /play/[session_id] route that: (1) Loads narrative session state via +page.server.ts, (2) Displays current scene narrative text, (3) Shows available choices as interactive buttons, (4) Displays NPC references present in scene, (5) Handles scene transitions with form actions (POST to select-choice). This is the core gameplay screen — the digital tabletop. Use SvelteKit form actions for mutations.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T17:53:13Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-03T17:53:13Z"}

Include create character form (POST /characters/create action). Use +page.server.ts load functions and form actions.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T17:53:16Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-03T17:53:16Z"}

{"id":"otherworlds-rpg-x9s","title":"Build session management pages","description":"Create /sessions route (list campaign runs) and /sessions/[run_id] route (detail with checkpoints). List: show all campaign runs with status. Detail: show run details, checkpoint history, branch timeline option. Include start-campaign-run and create-checkpoint form actions. Connect to /play/[session_id] for entering gameplay.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T17:53:19Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-03T17:53:19Z"}

{"id":"otherworlds-rpg-biu","title":"Build campaign browsing and content pages (SSR)","description":"Create /campaigns route (list) and /campaigns/[campaign_id] route (detail). SSR-optimized for SEO. List: show all campaigns with status (ingested/validated/compiled). Detail: show campaign content, validation status. Include ingest/validate/compile actions for content authoring workflow.
